acceptance_criteria: The workflow can start from a local synthetic story fixture instead of a live Azure DevOps work item link.
The intake stage preserves the raw synthetic story input and normalizes acceptance criteria into the canonical intake artifacts consumed by downstream stages.
ADO-specific actions are skipped when the synthetic story does not provide Azure DevOps metadata.
summary: Synthetic fixture TEST-AC-001 normalized successfully. All three intake artifacts created. Acceptance criteria converted from list to keyed format. No Azure DevOps metadata detected—ADO-specific handling disabled per fixture design. Ready for downstream stages (task-plan, assignment, implementation, QA).
